project_type: Next.js 15.5.18 app with Firebase, Tailwind CSS
verification_instructions: Run 'npm run build' to verify the app builds successfully without errors
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - can install npm packages. No public/ directory exists yet, needs to be created.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing patterns: use Tailwind CSS utility classes plus custom component classes (btn-primary, btn-secondary, card, input-field), use 'use client' directive for client components, use AuthContext for auth state.
key_patterns: Pages use 'use client' directive, import Navbar component, use AuthContext for role-based access. Admin pages check userData.role === 'admin'. Styling uses Tailwind with custom @layer components in globals.css. No public/ directory exists - needs creation for manifest and icons.
directory_structure: src/app/ - pages (admin/, auth/, candidate/), src/components/ - shared components, src/context/ - AuthContext, src/lib/ - firebase config and helpers, src/styles/ - globals.css
